name: Minted Rice Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, combine the vegetable oils, walnut oil, white wine vinegar, and rinsed mint leaves.
2. Blend until smooth.
3. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
4. Add the warm orzo rice and cooked wild rice to the blended mixture.
5. Mix well to combine all ingredients.
6. Serve at room temperature.
Yield: 8 servings
